nameMeanings.name: Choke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): from Middle English cloke ‘cloak’ (Old French cloche, cloke), a nickname denoting an habitual or distinctive cloak wearer, or perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a cloak maker.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Choke was born in 1386, in Stanton Drew, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with John Choke. She died in her hometown.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Choke(은)는 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스탠턴 드루에서 태어났다. 그녀는 John Choke(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.
